name: maddi-vscode
description: Modification, immutability and independence analysis for Java

maddi.jdkHome.markdownDescription: Home of a **JDK 25 or later**. maddi runs on this and reads `java.base` from it; it is not the JDK the project targets, nor the one VS Code runs on. Required.

maddi.daemonInstall.markdownDescription: Directory of the maddi daemon distribution (containing `bin/` and `lib/`). Empty uses the copy bundled with the extension.

maddi.daemonXmxMb.description: Maximum heap for the analysis daemon, in MB.

enumDescriptions: Hide annotations the enclosing declaration already implies; keep the surprises
maddi.hints.markdownDescription: Which computed annotations appear as inline hints. Mirrors the same setting in the IntelliJ and Eclipse plugins.

maddi.warnNearMisses.markdownDescription: Report types and methods that narrowly miss a property, e.g. one modifying method away from `@Container`. Advisory; expect noise on code not curated for it.
